summary: E2E testing complete for CalmSphere AI new features: Appointments, Journal, Community, and Insights. All backend APIs working (20/20 tests passed). All frontend features working correctly with proper navigation and data flow.

success_rate.backend: 100% (20/20 new feature tests + 15 existing tests passed)

seed_data_creation: Created test appointments, journal entries, community posts during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new feature pages tested successfully. Backend APIs for appointments, journal, community, insights all working. Added data-testid attributes to Dashboard buttons and Back buttons on all pages for easier test automation.

dashboard.details: Dashboard loads with all navigation buttons visible (Talk to CalmSphere, Take Assessment, Log Mood, View Progress, Appointments, Journal, Community, Insights)

details: Page loads with header, back button, and book appointment button
Booking form opens with all fields (counselor name, date/time, type, notes)
Form validation works - date is required
Appointment successfully created and appears in list
Page loads with writing prompts section
New entry form opens with title and content fields
Entry successfully created with sentiment analysis
Page loads with category filter buttons (All, Stress, Anxiety, Depression, Success, Support)
Create post form opens with category dropdown, title, and content fields
Page loads and shows 'Not enough data' message when no mood entries exist

backend_apis.appointments: PASSED - book, get, update status endpoints working
backend_apis.journal: PASSED - create entry, get entries, get prompts endpoints working
backend_apis.community: PASSED - create post, get posts, filter by category, like, comment endpoints working
backend_apis.insights: PASSED - weekly insight endpoint returns proper no-data message
backend_apis.goals: PASSED - create goal, get goals endpoints working
